findings.description: The comment `//必要に応じてConfigurationへその他の設定を行う` is omitted from the ConfigurationFactory code example. This comment informs developers that additional Configuration settings can be added as needed, which is useful guidance when customizing FreeMarker behavior.
findings.source_evidence: Source createObject() method includes: `cfg.setDefaultEncoding(encoding); //必要に応じてConfigurationへその他の設定を行う`
